title: Admin Settings
description: Manage your platform configuration, users, and global parameters.

brandIdentity.note: Upload a logo for the admin panel and emails. Suggested size: 512x512px (PNG, SVG).

terms.apps:
# ***Terms of Service***

###<u> 1. Acceptance of Terms</u>
By accessing and using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

### 2. Account Responsibilities
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

### 3. Platform Usage
You agree not to misuse the platform, interfere with other users, or attempt to access restricted services without authorization.**text**
terms.business:
# Business Terms of Service

### 1. Commercial Eligibility
Business accounts must provide accurate company information and maintain an active point of contact for compliance updates.

### 2. Billing and Renewals
Commercial subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. Charges are billed to the payment method on file.

### 3. Service Availability
# We may modify, suspend, or discontinue business features when operational, security, or legal requirements require it.

privacy.apps:
# Privacy Policy

### 1. Information We Collect
We collect account details, device information, and usage activity needed to operate, secure, and improve the app experience.

### 2. How We Use Data
Collected information is used to deliver services, personalize the product, respond to support requests, and enforce platform policies.

### 3. Data Retention
We retain personal data only as long as necessary to meet contractual, legal, and operational obligations.
privacy.business:
# Business Privacy Policy

### 1. Business Contact Data
We collect administrator details, team member information, and account-level configuration data required to deliver business services.

### 2. Processing and Security
Business data is processed under strict access controls and industry-standard safeguards designed to protect confidentiality and integrity.

### 3. Data Requests
Authorized administrators may request export, correction, or deletion of eligible business records in accordance with applicable law.
